arts.sum: After his goal against Lecce last time out, he could score in back-to-back Serie A games for the first time since March 2021 (3 in a row, the first of which came against Napoli). Matteo Politano has scored four goals against Fiorentina in Serie A (2 for Sassuolo, 1 for Inter and 1 for Napoli) and only against AC Milan and Genoa has he netted more times in the top-flight (5 vs both).
